case_title: FRANK FAHY VS. BONAFACIO VILLANUEVA MOYRONG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2012 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,499.00 FILED BY FAHY, FRANK AS TO DEFENDANT MOYRONG, BONAFACIO VILLANUEVA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2012 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-13-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $45.00 SERVED OCT-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MOYRONG, BONAFACIO VILLANUEVA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FAHY, FRANK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOYRONG, BONAFACIO VILLANUEVA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
